race.comment: AREDUET (8) took advantage of the good draw and sat on the pace last start before tiring to finish seventh over 1190m at Narrogin. Looks well placed at this level and makes plenty of appeal. BEYOND THE WALL (1) resumes from a spell of eight months. Could only manage to finish fifth at the latest run over 1100m at Kalgoorlie. Tuned up with an eighth in a recent trial at Lark Hill. Set for a bold return. VIVA MARCONI (2) last appeared when he finished 11th over 1200m at Pinjarra Scarpside on January 25. Lines up today for the first time for trainer Sean & Jake Casey. Comes here with definite top-three claims. OLE GRANDE (6) looks a genuine hope first-up.
